title: Database Testing Strategies Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on database testing patterns.

questions.question: Regarding the testing of database-interacting code, what is the primary role of a 'Test Database'?
options: To collect and analyze production data
To provide a controlled, disposable, and predictable environment for running tests

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a database-testing-based workflow?
options: Automating database seeding and cleanup to ensure a clean state for every test
Recording a commit directly to the SQL server
Its only possible for SQL repositories
